name: dag-video-editor
description: Build videos from DAG concepts with automated timeline/publish pipeline

scripts.run: echo "[deprecated] use ai-director-app" && npm --prefix ../ai-director-app run run
scripts.run:dry: echo "[deprecated] use ai-director-app" && npm --prefix ../ai-director-app run run:dry
scripts.subtitles: echo "[deprecated] use ai-director-app stage subtitles" && npm --prefix ../ai-director-app run build && node ../ai-director-app/dist/core/src/cli/build-project.js --project ../ai-director-app/projects/walrus-dfs --from-stage subtitles --to-stage subtitles --skip-upload
